topic: remote developer jobs that pay six figures
hook: Pick one: remote developer jobs that pay six figures.

script_segments.text: Pick one: remote developer jobs that pay six figures.
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing remote developer jobs that pay six figures. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: The answer is obvious. Or is it? Comment which side you're on.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: remote developer jobs that pay six figures — explained in a way that actually makes sense.
sound_suggestion: game show buzzer / choice sound effect
